revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:MoS guideline]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:MoS guideline]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Using updated wording from the {{Guideline}} template
1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text:
{{Mbox | type = notice | image = [[File:Blue check.svg|30px|link=|alt=]] | imageright = {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Ombox/shortcut|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}}}}}} | text =
'''This [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines#guide|guideline]]{{#if:{{{section|}}}| section}} is a part of the English Wikipedia's {{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Manual of Style|Manual of Style|[[Wikipedia:Manual of Style|Manual of Style]]}}.'''
Editors should generally follow it, though [[Wikipedia:Ignore all rules|exceptions]] may apply. ''Substantive'' edits to this {{#if:{{{section|}}}|section|page}} should reflect [[WP:PGCHANGE|consensus]]. When in doubt, discuss first on [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|this guideline's talk page]].
}}{{documentation}} [[Category:qq]][[sn:MoS guideline]][[ja:MoS guideline]][[Category:qq]]

{{Mbox | type = notice | image = [[File:Blue check.svg|30px|link=|alt=]] | imageright = {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Ombox/shortcut|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}}}}}} | text =

Editors should generally follow it, though [[Wikipedia:Ignore all rules|exceptions]] may apply. ''Substantive'' edits to this {{#if:{{{section|}}}|section|page}} should reflect [[WP:PGCHANGE|consensus]]. When in doubt, discuss first on [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|this guideline's talk page]].

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
{{Mbox | type = notice | image = [[File:Blue check.svg|30px|link=|alt=]] | imageright = {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Ombox/shortcut|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}}}}}} | text =
'''This [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines#guide|guideline]]{{#if:{{{section|}}}| section}} is a part of the English Wikipedia's {{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Manual of Style|Manual of Style|[[Wikipedia:Manual of Style|Manual of Style]]}}.'''
Editors should generally follow it, though [[Wikipedia:Ignore all rules|exceptions]] may apply. ''Substantive'' edits to this {{#if:{{{section|}}}|section|page}} should reflect [[WP:PGCHANGE|consensus]]. When in doubt, discuss first on [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|this guideline's talk page]].
}}{{documentation}} [[sn:MoS guideline]][[sn:oS guideline]] [[sn:oS guideline]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

{{Mbox | type = notice | image = [[File:Blue check.svg|30px|link=|alt=]] | imageright = {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Ombox/shortcut|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}}}}}} | text =

Editors should generally follow it, though [[Wikipedia:Ignore all rules|exceptions]] may apply. ''Substantive'' edits to this {{#if:{{{section|}}}|section|page}} should reflect [[WP:PGCHANGE|consensus]]. When in doubt, discuss first on [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|this guideline's talk page]].
}}{{documentation}} [[sn:MoS guideline]][[sn:oS guideline]] [[sn:oS guideline]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Using wording consistent with the {{Guideline}} template and use <em> for accessibility
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
